title: Joy of Playing
description: Automation and building focused modpack, includes the likes of Create, Biomes O' Plenty, Tectonic, Terralith, Tetra and more!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZsI6d5__8SE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Hello!** This is a **modpack** based around **Automation**, **Scenery** and **Building**. Here go some of the more prominent **mods**:

### Automation:
- Create + Addons
### World Generation:
- Biomes O' Plenty
- Terralith
- Tectonic
- Quark
### Structure Generation:
- Yung's Structures
### Building:
- Chipped
- Create: Copycats+
- Twigs
### Weaponry & Tools:
- Tetra
- Sophisticated Backpacks
### Client Side:
- Fog
- Cave Dust
- Better Clouds
- FirstPerson
- Continuity
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Sounds
### Multiplayer:
- Open Parties and Claims
- Simple Voice Chat

**This took me a lot of time to set up, so if you do check it out, thanks!**

**Any questions, suggestions or issues you wanna report? DM me on discord!**

### Disclaimer:
This mod works best on 6GBs of dedicated RAM!
I cannot guarantee this modpack will run on older devices, right now i run the modpack without shaders at around 100fps in an area with plenty of machines with 24 chunks render distance, i currently have a ryzen 5 3600 CPU and a RTX 3060 GPU.

### Permissions:
- Falling Leaves: [https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves)
- Macaw's Doors: [https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-doors)
- Macaw's Fences and Walls: [https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-fences-and-walls](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-fences-and-walls)
- Macaw's Trapdoors: [https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-trapdoors](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-trapdoors)
- Macaw's Windows: [https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-windows](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-windows)
- Memory Leak Fix: [https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix)
- Sounds: [https://modrinth.com/mod/sound](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound)
- Mineblock's Repeated Utilities: [https://modrinth.com/mod/mru](https://modrinth.com/mod/mru)
- Remove Reloading Screen: [https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls)
